_instructions.usage: Fill in every field below with real project data, then seed it with: npx tsx scripts/seed-from-json.ts path/to/this-file.json
rules: Do NOT remove any key — if unknown, leave as null or empty string.
Leave image/document storage_url and url as empty string '' — add via admin Media panel

project.name: Apex Athena
project.address: Plot No. GH-12A, Eco City, Sector 75, Noida, Uttar Pradesh 201304
project.description: Apex Athena is a premium ready-to-move-in residential complex in Sector 75, Noida, offering spacious and structural-sound 2, 3, and 4 BHK luxury residences.
project.long_description: Apex Athena is a premier ready-to-move-in residential project spanning 7 acres in Sector 75, Noida. Developed by the highly reputed builder Apex Group (under Apex Dream Homes Private Limited), the project features 619 premium apartments spread across 6 magnificent high-rise towers rising G+25 floors. Celebrated for its architectural strength and premium build quality, the complex boasts an 80% open-space layout dedicated to lush central gardens, walking tracks, and active recreational zones. The apartments are exceptionally spacious, featuring premium vitrified flooring in standard areas, laminated wooden flooring in master bedrooms, high-finish wood-paneled flush doors, and modular kitchen utility areas. The society is equipped with top-tier lifestyle amenities including a grand operational clubhouse, wellness sauna rooms, an adult swimming pool, a dedicated kid's pool, and multiple sports courts. Located in one of Noida's fastest-growing premium corridors right behind the Spectrum Metro Mall and just 300 meters from the Sector 50 Metro Station, the project offers a highly sought-after lifestyle address. While registries are active and ongoing, resale buyers should strictly verify individual flat NOC clearances.
marketing_claims: 80% Landscaped Open Area with Central Parks
300m Walk to Sector 50 Aqua Line Metro
Grand Central Clubhouse with Spa & Sauna
High-Speed Elevators with Power Backup Lobbies
project.project_risk_flag: Low-Moderate: Some individual flat registries were historically delayed due to stamp clearances. Proceed with standard registry NOC.
registry_embargo_reasons: Registries are active, but resale transactions require strict builder transfer NOC.

builder.name: Apex Group
builder.company_overview: Apex Group (Apex Buildcon India Pvt Ltd) is an acclaimed premium real estate developer operating in Delhi NCR for over 15 years. Led by a highly professional management team, the developer is recognized for delivering landmark structures including Apex Athena, Apex Kremlin, and Apex Kremlin, showcasing excellent civil engineering standards and robust project completions.

unit_types.name: 2.5 BHK (Athena Comfort)
unit_types.subtitle: 2 BHK + Study Configuration
unit_types.description: Premium 2 BHK featuring an attached study/utility room, three large balconies.

unit_types.name: 3 BHK (Athena Executive)
unit_types.subtitle: Spacious family 3 BHK
unit_types.description: Large living-dining layout with master private balcony and three attached toilets.

unit_types.name: 4 BHK (Athena Imperial)
unit_types.subtitle: Flagship spacious flat
unit_types.description: Palatial 4 BHK with premium double-balcony living, luxury master suite, and servant room entry.

connectivity.name: Medanta Super-Speciality Hospital
connectivity.notes: Premium emergency healthcare across the road

decision_profile.decision_thesis: Apex Athena represents a premium, spacious ready-to-move-in residential complex in Sector 75 with top-tier construction finish and high-quality lifestyle amenities.
why_buy: Exceptional Finish Standards: Superior structural strength, quality wood trims, and premium tile selections.
Excellent Area Efficiency: Larger carpet-to-super areas in the 3 BHK and 4 BHK configurations.
Unbeatable Location: Located right behind Spectrum Metro Mall with direct main road exit.
Low Project Density: Low density layout of 88 units per acre on a 7-acre plot.
why_avoid: Legacy Stamp Violations: Stamp department in 2018 flagged possession handovers without fully executed registries.
Slow Registry Processing: Registry processes are slow due to consortium dues, though better than Gardenia.
Higher Maintenance Charges: Premium clubhouse and lawn upkeep results in high monthly maintenance fees.
decision_profile.best_for: Corporate executives and end-users desiring premium, large-format ready-to-move spaces with superior security and finishes.
decision_profile.not_ideal_for: Budget buyers with under ₹1.2 Crore budgets or flippers seeking rapid capital appreciation.

buyerPersonas.headline: Luxury specs over mass housing
reasons: Excellent modular kitchen points, solid hardwood doors, and laminated wooden flooring.
Highly secure gated complex with central parks and grand entry lounge.

riskRadar.description: Registries are slow and require strict tower-wise clear NOC verification from Noida Authority before buying.
Highly managed clubhouse but maintenance bills are above average.

transparency_checks.label: OC / CC Received
transparency_checks.details: Completion Cert issued in phases from 2019 onwards.

transparency_checks.label: Registry Active
transparency_checks.details: Partially active; registries are executing on cleared inventory slots.

transparency_checks.label: Escrow Account
transparency_checks.details: Escrow maintained under TATA Capital Project construction financing.

transparency_checks.label: NCLT Moratorium
transparency_checks.details: Apex Group / Promoter is financially stable and not in NCLT.

investment_insights.appreciation_desc: Consistent year-on-year appreciation driven by central sector maturity.
investment_insights.rental_desc: Highly sought after by MNC senior managers; 3 BHK rental commands ₹40,000 to ₹55,000/month.
investment_insights.market_desc: Steady buying interest as premium supply in Sector 75 is capped.
investment_insights.liquidity_desc: Excellent exit liquidity due to solid builder reputation and premium finishes.

persona_descriptions.UPGRADER: Middle-aged corporate executives upgrading from older Sectors (62, 22) who seek clean gated infrastructure, high construction standards, and short commutes.
persona_descriptions.INVESTOR: Long-term wealth-preservation capital allocators targeting premium central Noida assets.

persona_profile.risk_appetite: Conservative (preferring physically completed, RERA-compliant projects with strong bank tie-ups)
persona_profile.family_stage: Nuclear family with school children or senior parents
persona_profile.work_location: Noida Sector 62, Sector 135/142 IT Corridor, or Delhi Central
persona_profile.motivation_note: Prioritizes immediate luxury, spacious high-end configurations, premium structural safety, and immediate transit connection to metro and shopping nodes.

recommendation_profile.primary_thesis: Apex Athena is one of the highest quality ready-to-move projects in Sector 75 Noida. It offers premium, spacious floor plans and is structurally highly superior. Proceed with purchase ensuring individual unit registry NOC.
recommendation_profile.end_use_thesis: Highly habitable, safe, and family-friendly with double-balcony master suites, central parks, and beautifully maintained club facility. Daily commute is highly efficient.
recommendation_profile.investment_thesis: An excellent asset for stable wealth-preservation with reliable rental income and consistent 8-10% annual capital appreciation.
recommendation_profile.family_thesis: Outstanding security setups, close to highly rated international schools, and directly behind Medanta Hospital.
recommendation_profile.investor_thesis: High resale demand and fast renter occupancy ensures minimal holding vacancy risk.
recommendation_profile.luxury_thesis: Solid mid-luxury specifications with grand entrance lobbies, private passenger elevators, and premium laminated wooden bedroom configurations.
recommendation_profile.risk_thesis: Low construction and low financial risk. Only check for any pending individual flat stamp dues or minor builder clearances before execution.
walk_away_conditions: Unwillingness of seller to clear any pending municipal dues prior to registry.
Units showing poor maintenance history or minor tower leakages.
negotiation_leverage: Benchmark against under-construction alternatives in Noida Extension to negotiate lower resale rates.
Highlight registry delay concerns to extract a slight discount from motivated owners.
recommendation_profile.timeline_advice: A stellar RTM asset. Close the transaction immediately if a verified, registered 3 BHK unit is available around ₹1.8 Cr to ₹2.1 Cr.

competitors.this_project_advantage: Slightly more competitive price per sqft; larger 3 BHK balcony spaces.
competitors.competitor_advantage: Ultra-luxury brand positioning; lower overall society density.
competitors.verdict: Choose Dasnac for ultra-high prestige; choose Apex Athena for spacious premium value and practical luxury.
competitors.price_delta_note: Apex Athena is ₹1,000/sqft cheaper than Dasnac.
